description_long: This is a vintage-style van with a matte black exterior, featuring a prominent Volkswagen emblem on the front and a variety of colorful stickers and decals on the rear. The van has rectangular windows along both sides, with the right side displaying a large, stylized 'SCOOBY-DOO!' logo and a cartoon character peeking out from one of the windows. The wheels are solid black, and the bodywork shows signs of wear and weathering, giving it a rugged, well-used appearance. The rear is heavily decorated with pop culture stickers, including brands and logos, and a white license plate with a red 'Off The Wall' sticker above it. The front view reveals two large, square headlights and a pink-tinted license plate. The van's overall design suggests it is intended for urban or recreational use, with ample interior space likely accessible through multiple doors.
description: A weathered, matte black vintage van with pop culture stickers, a 'SCOOBY-DOO!' logo, and a Volkswagen emblem, featuring multiple windows and a rugged, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Volkswagen emblem, two square headlights, side mirrors, and a pink-tinted license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying several rectangular windows, a cartoon character in the rear window, and subtle weathering on the body.
description_view_2: Rear view with a white license plate, 'Off The Wall' sticker, and a dense array of colorful pop culture stickers covering the lower half.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring the large 'SCOOBY-DOO!' logo, multiple windows, and a cartoon character in the rear window.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
